claim_boundary: Accepts the exact CPython 3.14.5 second-product authority after external inspection. It does not accept any upgrade, downgrade, mixed-version, migration, or transition behavior.

bundled_libmpdec.behavior: system libmpdec probe failed and exact upstream bundled libmpdec was compiled into _decimal
bundled_libmpdec.evidence: target configure/build passed and isolated _decimal import returned 0
bundled_libmpdec.follow_up: system libmpdec becomes a producer prerequisite before any Python 3.16 product authority

hacl_memzero.accepted_claim: the exact CPython 3.14.5 product built and passed _hashlib import plus selected test_hashlib validation with this fallback
hacl_memzero.behavior: the upstream no-safe-memzero fallback path was selected after explicit_bzero and explicit_memset were unavailable
hacl_memzero.evidence_path: Modules/_hacl/Lib_Memzero0.c:66 in the exact A3 build logs
hacl_memzero.follow_up: track upstream/Android explicit zeroization support; changing implementation requires a new producer authority
hacl_memzero.not_claimed: cryptographically guaranteed or platform-provided secure erasure
